open_repo_assist_prs.title: perf(image): skip scanner.Text() allocation for non-image lines
open_repo_assist_prs.note: Bytes pre-filter eliminates scanner.Text() alloc on non-image lines; -37%/-53% ns/op, -48%/-66% allocs
